title: Basic Chest Search
description: Adds Search ability to containers with various filters.
body:
# 🔍 Basic Chest Search

**Basic Chest Search** is a lightweight, client-side utility mod for Minecraft (Fabric) that adds a powerful search bar to container interfaces such as chests, shulker boxes, and bundles. Save time and find your items instantly!

## ✨ Search Features

* **Item Names:** Search by display names.
* **Tag Support:** Use the `#` prefix to search for item tags (e.g., `#logs`).
* **Enchantments:** Find items based on their enchantments or levels.
* **Recursive Search:** Automatically search inside **Bundles** and **Nested Containers** (e.g., shulker boxes inside a chest).

## ⌨️ Controls

* **Toggle Search Bar:** Press **`T`** (default key) to show or hide the search bar.
* **Quick Clear:** Double-click inside the search bar to empty the input field immediately.

## ⚙️ Configuration (Optional)

If you have **Cloth Config** and **Mod Menu** installed, you can customize the following settings:

* **Search Mode:** Choose how the search results are displayed:
    * **`SORT`**: Moves matches to the front and hides non-matching items.
    * **`DARKEN`**: Dims non-matching items to highlight your results.
    * **`DISABLED`**: Completely disables the search bar functionality.
* **Keep Search:** Retain your search text even after closing and reopening a container.
* **Auto-Focus:** Automatically focus the search bar the moment you open a container.
* **Detach bar:** Decouple the search bar from the inventory window for a custom layout.

## 📦 Requirements

* **Fabric Loader**
* **Fabric API**
* **Recommended:** [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) & [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (to access the settings menu)

## 📜 Credits
